meaning: A specific task assigned to an individual during a meeting to be completed later.
definition: A documented event, task, activity, or action that needs to take place.
example: Our team has three action items to complete before the next review.
exampleHindi: हमारी टीम के पास अगली समीक्षा से पहले पूरा करने के लिए तीन कार्य आइटम हैं।

meaning: To give someone responsibility for a task or project.
definition: To give someone responsibility for a task or project.
example: The manager will assign the research task to the marketing team.
exampleHindi: प्रबंधक विपणन टीम को अनुसंधान कार्य सौंपेगा।

meaning: A list of future tasks or project requirements that are waiting to be done.
definition: A list of future tasks or project requirements that are waiting to be done.
example: We put the new feature request into the project backlog for next month.
exampleHindi: हमने नए फीचर अनुरोध को अगले महीने के प्रोजेक्ट बैकलॉग में डाल दिया है।

meaning: Unable to make progress on a task due to waiting for someone or something else.
definition: Unable to make progress on a task due to waiting for someone or something else.
example: I am blocked on writing the report because I don't have the final numbers.
exampleHindi: मुझे रिपोर्ट लिखने से रोका गया है क्योंकि मेरे पास अंतिम आंकड़े नहीं हैं।

meaning: To write or create a document together with one or more people.
definition: To write or create a document together with one or more people.
example: We will co-author the guide on a shared cloud document.
exampleHindi: हम साझा क्लाउड दस्तावेज़ पर गाइड का सह-लेखन करेंगे।

meaning: A final product, document, or service that must be completed and handed over.
definition: A thing able to be provided, especially a product of a development process.
example: The design prototype is our main deliverable for this week.
exampleHindi: इस सप्ताह के लिए डिज़ाइन प्रोटोटाइप हमारा मुख्य वितरण योग्य है।

meaning: The date or time by which a task must be completed.
definition: The date or time by which a task must be completed.
example: The due date for submitting the draft proposal is this Friday.
exampleHindi: मसौदा प्रस्ताव जमा करने की नियत तारीख इस शुक्रवार है।

meaning: Passing responsibility for a project or task to another person.
definition: Passing responsibility for a project or task to another person.
example: I completed the handover process before leaving for my vacation.
exampleHindi: मैंने अपनी छुट्टियों पर जाने से पहले हैंडओवर प्रक्रिया पूरी कर ली।

meaning: Currently being worked on and not yet finished.
definition: Currently being worked on and not yet finished.
example: The website redesign is currently in progress and looking great.
exampleHindi: वेबसाइट को नया स्वरूप देने का काम अभी प्रगति पर है और बहुत अच्छा लग रहा है।

meaning: An important event or key stage in the progress of a project.
definition: A significant point in development, like reaching 1M subscribers.
example: Releasing the beta version was a major milestone for our team.
exampleHindi: बीटा संस्करण जारी करना हमारी टीम के लिए एक बड़ा मील का पत्थर था।

meaning: A visual tool used to organize and track tasks in a project.
definition: A visual tool used to organize and track tasks in a project.
example: Please check the project board to see which tasks are still pending.
exampleHindi: कृपया यह देखने के लिए प्रोजेक्ट बोर्ड की जाँच करें कि कौन से कार्य अभी भी लंबित हैं।

meaning: A short, set period of time (typically two weeks) to complete specific tasks.
definition: A set, short time-box wherein a specific work has to be completed and made ready for review.
example: We have several high-priority tasks to deliver in this sprint.
exampleHindi: इस स्प्रिंट में देने के लिए हमारे पास कई उच्च प्राथमिकता वाले कार्य हैं।

meaning: A quick, daily meeting where team members share progress and issues.
definition: A daily short meeting to discuss status.
example: In our morning standup, I reported that my code changes are complete.
exampleHindi: हमारे सुबह के स्टैंडअप में, मैंने बताया कि मेरे कोड परिवर्तन पूरे हो गए हैं।

meaning: To meet or talk to ensure everyone has the same information and goals.
definition: To meet or talk to ensure everyone has the same information and goals.
example: Let's sync up tomorrow morning to align our project plans.
exampleHindi: आइए कल सुबह अपनी परियोजना योजनाओं को संरेखित करने के लिए समन्वय स्थापित करें।

meaning: The person who is responsible for ensuring a task is finished.
definition: The person who is responsible for ensuring a task is finished.
example: As the task owner, you must update the status on the board.
exampleHindi: कार्य स्वामी के रूप में, आपको बोर्ड पर स्थिति अद्यतन करनी होगी।

meaning: A digital record used to track a specific request, task, or bug report.
definition: A digital record used to track a specific request, task, or bug report.
example: I submitted a support ticket to get my password reset.
exampleHindi: मैंने अपना पासवर्ड रीसेट करने के लिए एक सहायता टिकट जमा किया है।

meaning: A schedule showing when tasks in a project are planned to happen.
definition: A schedule showing when tasks in a project are planned to happen.
example: The project timeline shows we have three weeks left before the launch.
exampleHindi: प्रोजेक्ट टाइमलाइन से पता चलता है कि लॉन्च से पहले हमारे पास तीन सप्ताह बचे हैं।

meaning: To remove an obstacle so that progress on a task can continue.
definition: To remove an obstacle so that progress on a task can continue.
example: Thank you for sending the data; that unblocks my analysis task.
exampleHindi: डेटा भेजने के लिए धन्यवाद; यह मेरे विश्लेषण कार्य को अनब्लॉक करता है।

meaning: The sequence of steps a task goes through from start to finish.
definition: The sequence of steps a task goes through from start to finish.
example: We need to define a clear workflow for review and approval of content.
exampleHindi: हमें सामग्री की समीक्षा और अनुमोदन के लिए एक स्पष्ट वर्कफ़्लो परिभाषित करने की आवश्यकता है।
